iframe.noUrl: No URL configured for this widget.

sidebar.title: Widgets
sidebar.noWidgets: No custom widgets in this conversation.

supportedWidgetsPlaceholder: Select widgets this agent can use...
supportedWidgetsDescription: Standard and custom widgets that can be rendered in the chat.

widgetInfo.title: Widget Prompt Guide
widgetInfo.description: Use the following format in your agent's prompt to trigger interactive widgets in the chat.
widgetInfo.formatDescription: The LLM must output this tag in its response to trigger a widget:
widgetInfo.yesnoDescription: Displays two buttons (Yes/No). The user's choice is sent as a message.
widgetInfo.surveyDescription: Multi-question survey with options and optional free-text answers.
widgetInfo.customDescription: Triggers a registered custom widget (Form or iFrame) by its ID.
